title: Cognizant ML Experience - Factual Source
content:
Role context:
- Position: Machine Learning Engineer at Cognizant (January 2020 to July 2023).
- Focus domain: Document intelligence, NLP pipelines, and enterprise ML deployment across regulated industries.

Progression and ownership:
- Early phase involved model development support, text preprocessing, feature extraction, and evaluation.
- Mid phase moved to end-to-end project ownership for contract analysis and entity extraction workflows.
- Senior phase included technical architecture, multi-project leadership, mentoring, and client-facing delivery.

Consistent project patterns from source content:
- Contract and legal document processing with entity extraction, classification, clause detection, and summarization.
- Healthcare and insurance document intelligence requiring OCR, domain-adapted NLP, and strict reliability standards.
- Scalable pipelines using cloud and containerized deployment patterns for high-volume processing.

Reported outcomes in the source guides:
- Reduction of manual review or processing time through NLP automation.
- Improved throughput, accuracy, and operational consistency in production environments.
- Expansion from individual contributor execution to leadership in architecture and delivery.

Skills and engineering themes emphasized:
- Applied NLP model development and tuning for domain-specific corpora.
- ML engineering discipline around deployment, uptime, and integration.
- Collaboration across legal, healthcare, insurance, and enterprise stakeholder contexts.
